name: @vocode/vscode-extension
description: Voice-driven coding assistant for VS Code

vocode.voiceVadDebug.description: Forward VOCODE_VOICE_VAD_DEBUG=1 to the voice sidecar ([vocode-vad] lines on stderr).

vocode.voiceSidecarLogProtocol.description: Log every JSON line from the voice sidecar to Developer Tools (very noisy). Leave off to see stderr debug lines ([vocode-vad], [vocode-stt]) clearly.

vocode.elevenLabsSttLanguage.description: ElevenLabs realtime language_code (ISO 639-1). Use "auto" for server auto-detect.

vocode.voiceSttCommitResponseTimeoutMs.description: After commit:true, flush deferred PCM if committed_transcript never arrives (ms, max 180000 / 180s). Also mapped to ElevenLabs realtime inactivity_timeout (rounded up to seconds; provider cap applies). 0 = disabled for both behaviors.

vocode.voiceVadMinEnergyFloor.description: PCM16 RMS floor for speech vs noise per 20ms frame (VOCODE_VOICE_VAD_MIN_ENERGY_FLOOR).

vocode.voiceVadPrerollMs.description: Audio kept before declared speech start (ms).

vocode.voiceStreamMaxUtteranceMs.description: Force commit every N ms during one utterance; 0 = off (silence/EOF only).

vocode.daemonAgentProvider.description: Daemon transcript model: stub, openai (OPENAI_API_KEY), or anthropic (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Sets VOCODE_AGENT_PROVIDER.

vocode.daemonVoiceLogTranscript.description: Non-zero: log one line per voice.transcript (apply counts, directive count, success). Sets VOCODE_DAEMON_VOICE_LOG_TRANSCRIPT.

vocode.daemonOpenaiModel.description: OpenAI chat model when daemonAgentProvider is openai. Sets VOCODE_OPENAI_MODEL.

vocode.daemonOpenaiBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible API base URL (no trailing slash). Empty = https://api.openai.com/v1. Sets VOCODE_OPENAI_BASE_URL.

vocode.daemonAnthropicModel.description: Anthropic model id when daemonAgentProvider is anthropic. Sets VOCODE_ANTHROPIC_MODEL.

vocode.daemonAnthropicBaseUrl.description: Optional Anthropic API base URL (no trailing slash). Empty = https://api.anthropic.com/v1. Sets VOCODE_ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptQueueSize.description: Daemon voice transcript FIFO queue size.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptMaxMergeJobs.description: Max merged transcript jobs per coalesce.

vocode.daemonVoiceTranscriptMaxMergeChar.description: Max chars when merging transcript lines.

vocode.sessionIdleResetMs.description: Drop voice session state after this idle time (ms). 0 = off.
